comparison_scope: Document-type-specific OCR + parser + normalization + review-aware end-to-end extraction system

targets.name: Google Cloud Document AI Custom Extractor
targets.expected_output_shape: entity/value pairs per document processor schema
targets.positioning_notes: Strong baseline for structured extraction across variable layouts; compare as a managed custom extraction stack rather than raw OCR only.

targets.name: Microsoft Azure AI Document Intelligence Custom Extraction
targets.expected_output_shape: custom field schema from Document Intelligence Studio
targets.positioning_notes: Relevant managed comparator for custom extraction on fixed document families.

targets.name: Amazon Textract AnalyzeDocument + Queries
targets.expected_output_shape: OCR blocks plus query answers / structured relationships
targets.positioning_notes: Useful end-to-end cloud baseline when structured queries and layout relationships matter more than a single generic OCR output.
